creator: markun@onohara.to
text:
WWW::HatenaDiary provides a CRUD interface to Hatena::Diary,
aiming to help you efficiently communicate with the service
with programmatic ways.

Author:	Kentaro Kuribayashi <kentaro@cpan.org>
WWW:	http://search.cpan.org/~kentaro/WWW-HatenaDiary/

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77

This port depends on www/p5-WWW-HatenaLogin (PR: ports/133427).
